fixture_scope: root-bone-aware sample workflow plumbing with safe derived anterior landmarks

notes: Redacted structural metadata only; raw DICOM remains local and ignored.

registrations.model_provenance: bounds-center alignment from bundled STL metadata and redacted CBCT primary-volume metadata

notes: Accepted for the canonical sample fixture to exercise the root/bone-aware workflow. It is a deterministic bounds/landmark alignment, not a clinical registration.
